assessment.note: Skip/evasion on the pace check; no usable wellbeing or engagement signal yet.

new_queue.label: Settle the week
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Test?
new_queue.description: Safe opener that lets Test set context before any issue is introduced.

new_queue.label: Decision drag
new_queue.name: Where are you waiting on decisions that are slowing you down?
new_queue.description: Surfaces hidden dependency points without repeating the generic blocker scan.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Trade-offs now
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do right now?
new_queue.description: Forces the real priority trade-off behind the current workload.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?
new_queue.description: Gets specific manager support requests without turning into a generic check-in.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes the check-in by turning the discussion into a clear next focus.
